channel.title: 6-8 件事 (2026/4/19)
channel.description: 嘿，今天的技术资讯圈挺热闹的，尤其是围绕 **AI 编程（AI Coding）** 和 **智能体（Agent）** 的生态，出现了不少新工具和深度讨论。我发现几个明显趋势：一是大家越来越关注 AI 编程工具（如 Claude Code）的成本、体验和扩展能力；二是“AI 工程化”和“Agent 开发”正从概念走向具体实践和工具链；三是关于 AI 在工作流中实际应用的分享变多了，从设计到炒股都有。下面我为你挑出了最值得看的几件事。

item.title: 6-8 件事
item.description: 嘿，今天的技术资讯圈挺热闹的，尤其是围绕 **AI 编程（AI Coding）** 和 **智能体（Agent）** 的生态，出现了不少新工具和深度讨论。我发现几个明显趋势：一是大家越来越关注 AI 编程工具（如 Claude Code）的成本、体验和扩展能力；二是“AI 工程化”和“Agent 开发”正从概念走向具体实践和工具链；三是关于 AI 在工作流中实际应用的分享变多了，从设计到炒股都有。下面我为你挑出了最值得看的几件事。

item.title: getagentseal/codeburn
item.description: See where your AI coding tokens go. Interactive TUI dashboard for Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor cost observability. | 近期热门 | 总 2726 stars
item.author: getagentseal

item.title: Manavarya09/design-extract
item.description: Extract any website's complete design system with one command. DTCG tokens, semantic+primitive+composite, MCP server for Claude Code/Cursor/Windsurf, multi-platform emitters (iOS SwiftUI, Android Compose, Flutter, WordPress), Tailwind v4, Figma variables, shadcn/ui, CSS health audit, WCAG remediation, Chrome extension. MIT, Playwright, Node 20+. | 近期热门 | 总 1013 stars
item.author: Manavarya09

item.title: WeaveMindAI/weft
item.description: A programming language for AI systems | 近期热门 | 总 837 stars
item.author: WeaveMindAI

item.title: xataio/xata
item.description: Open source, cloud native, Postgres platform with copy-on-write branching and scale-to-zero | 近期热门 | 总 610 stars
item.author: xataio

item.title: millionco/claude-doctor
item.description: Diagnose your Claude Code sessions | 近期热门 | 总 464 stars
item.author: millionco

item.title: bergside/design-md-chrome
item.description: Chrome extension to extract styles from any website and generate DESIGN.md files and design skills for AI based on TypeUI | 近期热门 | 总 429 stars
item.author: bergside

item.title: Quorinex/Freebuff2API
item.description: 🚀 OpenAI-compatible Freebuff proxy with dynamic free-agent tracking, token rotation, and ready-to-use Docker deployment. | 近期热门 | 总 178 stars
item.author: Quorinex

item.title: Hainrixz/open-carrusel
item.description: AI-powered Instagram carousel builder. Chat with Claude to design slides; export as PNGs at exact Instagram dimensions. Type /start in Claude Code to bootstrap. | 近期热门 | 总 107 stars
item.author: Hainrixz

item.title: kwakseongjae/oh-my-design
item.description: Generate DESIGN.md from 67 real company design systems. Interactive wizard + shadcn/ui CSS export. Zero AI calls. | 近期热门 | 总 59 stars
item.author: kwakseongjae
